items.label: Development Complete — Schemas
messages: Intent: Now I understand the codebase structure. The feature is `health-check-ci` — I need to create health check schemas for a CI-compatible health endpoint. Let me check for any existing references and the backend structure.
Good — no existing health check code. This is a greenfield schema. Let me now create the health check schema and tests.
Now I have full context. Let me create the health check schema file, update the barrel export, and add tests.
Now add the test blocks at the end of the test file:
All 55 tests pass (30 existing + 25 new). Build succeeds. Now let me run the post-change review and commit:
Review confirms: **no breaking changes**, minimal structural impact (1.1% footprint), purely additive. Now commit and complete the pipeline:

shellCommands.command: cd /workspaces/DAGent-t && bash tools/autonomous-factory/agent-commit.sh backend "feat(schemas): add health check endpoint schemas (HealthStatus, HealthCheckEntry, HealthCheckResponse)" 2>&1
cd /workspaces/DAGent-t/apps/sample-app && npm run pipeline:complete health-check-ci schema-dev 2>&1
